[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01111000 4
1 11100000 3
2 01101010 4
3 00000100 1
4 01111000 4
5 11100000 3
6 01101010 4
7 00000100 1
